predicate_mappings.actor_has_assigned_wave: the actor has an assigned wave for {}
predicate_mappings.wave_permitted_for_actor: the wave {} is permitted for the actor {}
predicate_mappings.environment_permitted_for_actor: the environment {} is permitted for the actor {}

predicate_mappings.component_permitted_for_actor: {} is permitted for {} by the actor

register_release_actor.description: register release actor for a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only register release actor for a deployment actor A if it is not the case that the actor is registered for A and it is not the case that the actor is finalized for A
effects: Once I register release actor for a deployment actor A, it is the case that the actor is registered for A

assign_promotion_wave.description: assign a promotion wave B to a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only assign a promotion wave B to a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and B is available and the wave B is permitted for the actor A
I can only assign a promotion wave B to a deployment actor A if it is not the case that the actor has an assigned wave for A
effects: Once I assign a promotion wave B to a deployment actor A, it is the case that the actor has wave B for A and the actor has an assigned wave for A
Once I assign a promotion wave B to a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

remove_promotion_wave.description: remove a promotion wave B from a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only remove a promotion wave B from a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor has wave B for A
I can only remove a promotion wave B from a deployment actor A if it is not the case that promotion is in progress for A and it is not the case that promotion is authorized for A
effects: Once I remove a promotion wave B from a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is available

Once I remove a promotion wave B from a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that the actor has wave B for A and it is not the case anymore that the actor has an assigned wave for A and it is not the case anymore that validation passed for A and it is not the case anymore that pre release checks completed for A and it is not the case anymore that approval is recorded for A and it is not the case anymore that canary stage is enabled for A and it is not the case anymore that a rollback is prepared for A

reserve_deployment_target.description: reserve a deployment target B for a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only reserve a deployment target B for a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and B is available
effects: Once I reserve a deployment target B for a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is reserved for the actor in A
Once I reserve a deployment target B for a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_deployment_target.description: release a deployment target B from a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only release a deployment target B from a deployment actor A if it is the case that B is reserved for the actor in A
effects: Once I release a deployment target B from a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a deployment target B from a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for the actor in A

validate_reserved_target.description: validate a deployment target B reserved for a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only validate a deployment target B reserved for a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and the actor has an assigned wave for A and B is reserved for the actor in A
I can only validate a deployment target B reserved for a deployment actor A if it is not the case that validation passed for A
effects: Once I validate a deployment target B reserved for a deployment actor A, it is the case that validation passed for A

consume_approval_token.description: consume an approval token B for a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only consume an approval token B for a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and the actor has an assigned wave for A and B is available
I can only consume an approval token B for a deployment actor A if it is not the case that validation passed for A
effects: Once I consume an approval token B for a deployment actor A, it is the case that validation passed for A and approval is recorded for A
Once I consume an approval token B for a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

complete_runbook_check.description: complete a runbook check C for a deployment actor A on a deployment target B
preconditions: I can only complete a runbook check C for a deployment actor A on a deployment target B if it is the case that validation passed for A and the actor has an assigned wave for A and B is reserved for the actor in A and C is available
I can only complete a runbook check C for a deployment actor A on a deployment target B if it is not the case that pre release checks completed for A
effects: Once I complete a runbook check C for a deployment actor A on a deployment target B, it is the case that pre release checks completed for A
Once I complete a runbook check C for a deployment actor A on a deployment target B, it is not the case anymore that approval is recorded for A

verify_component_for_actor.description: verify a release component B for a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only verify a release component B for a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor has an assigned wave for A and B is verified for the actor A
I can only verify a release component B for a deployment actor A if it is not the case that pre release checks completed for A
effects: Once I verify a release component B for a deployment actor A, it is the case that pre release checks completed for A
Once I verify a release component B for a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that approval is recorded for A

reserve_and_bind_artifact.description: reserve and bind an artifact B to a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only reserve and bind an artifact B to a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and B is available and the artifact B is permitted for the actor A
effects: Once I reserve and bind an artifact B to a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is bound to the actor A
Once I reserve and bind an artifact B to a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_artifact_binding.description: release binding of an artifact B from a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only release binding of an artifact B from a deployment actor A if it is the case that B is bound to the actor A
effects: Once I release binding of an artifact B from a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release binding of an artifact B from a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is bound to the actor A

reserve_and_bind_service.description: reserve and bind a service B to a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only reserve and bind a service B to a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and B is available and the service B is permitted for the actor A
effects: Once I reserve and bind a service B to a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is bound to the actor A
Once I reserve and bind a service B to a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_service_binding.description: release binding of a service B from a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only release binding of a service B from a deployment actor A if it is the case that B is bound to the actor A
effects: Once I release binding of a service B from a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release binding of a service B from a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is bound to the actor A

reserve_and_bind_infrastructure.description: reserve and bind an infrastructure component B to a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only reserve and bind an infrastructure component B to a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and B is available and the infrastructure component B is permitted for the actor A
effects: Once I reserve and bind an infrastructure component B to a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is bound to the actor A
Once I reserve and bind an infrastructure component B to a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_infrastructure_binding.description: release an infrastructure component B from a deployment actor A binding
preconditions: I can only release an infrastructure component B from a deployment actor A binding if it is the case that B is bound to the actor A
effects: Once I release an infrastructure component B from a deployment actor A binding, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an infrastructure component B from a deployment actor A binding, it is not the case anymore that B is bound to the actor A

reserve_and_bind_patch.description: reserve and bind a hotfix patch B to a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only reserve and bind a hotfix patch B to a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and B is available and the patch B is permitted for the actor A
effects: Once I reserve and bind a hotfix patch B to a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is bound to the actor A
Once I reserve and bind a hotfix patch B to a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_patch_binding.description: release binding of a hotfix patch B from a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only release binding of a hotfix patch B from a deployment actor A if it is the case that B is bound to the actor A
effects: Once I release binding of a hotfix patch B from a deployment actor A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release binding of a hotfix patch B from a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is bound to the actor A

execute_promotion_step.description: execute promotion step for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an artifact C and a service D
preconditions: I can only execute promotion step for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an artifact C and a service D if it is the case that the actor has an assigned wave for A and C is bound to the actor A and D is bound to the actor A and B is available and the environment B is permitted for the actor A
I can only execute promotion step for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an artifact C and a service D if it is not the case that promotion is in progress for A
effects: Once I execute promotion step for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an artifact C and a service D, it is the case that A is promoted to the environment B and promotion is in progress for A
Once I execute promotion step for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an artifact C and a service D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

execute_promotion_with_maintenance.description: execute promotion with maintenance for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an infrastructure component C during a maintenance window D
preconditions: I can only execute promotion with maintenance for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an infrastructure component C during a maintenance window D if it is the case that the actor has an assigned wave for A and C is bound to the actor A and D is available and B is available and the environment B is permitted for the actor A and the maintenance window D is permitted for the actor A

I can only execute promotion with maintenance for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an infrastructure component C during a maintenance window D if it is not the case that promotion is in progress for A
effects: Once I execute promotion with maintenance for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an infrastructure component C during a maintenance window D, it is the case that A is promoted to the environment B and promotion is in progress for A and a rollback is prepared for A and approval is recorded for A

Once I execute promotion with maintenance for a deployment actor A in a deployment environment B using an infrastructure component C during a maintenance window D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_rollback_preparation.description: clear rollback preparation for a deployment actor A with an artifact B and a service C
preconditions: I can only clear rollback preparation for a deployment actor A with an artifact B and a service C if it is the case that promotion is in progress for A and a rollback is prepared for A and B is bound to the actor A and C is bound to the actor A
effects: Once I clear rollback preparation for a deployment actor A with an artifact B and a service C, it is not the case anymore that a rollback is prepared for A and it is not the case anymore that approval is recorded for A

authorize_promotion_by_stakeholders.description: authorize promotion by stakeholders for a deployment actor A with an artifact B, a service C, and a canary segment D
preconditions: I can only authorize promotion by stakeholders for a deployment actor A with an artifact B, a service C, and a canary segment D if it is the case that pre release checks completed for A and promotion is in progress for A and B is bound to the actor A and C is bound to the actor A and the actor A has the stakeholder group D

I can only authorize promotion by stakeholders for a deployment actor A with an artifact B, a service C, and a canary segment D if it is not the case that approval is recorded for A and it is not the case that promotion is authorized for A
effects: Once I authorize promotion by stakeholders for a deployment actor A with an artifact B, a service C, and a canary segment D, it is the case that promotion is authorized for A

authorize_promotion_with_compliance.description: authorize promotion with compliance for a deployment actor A involving an infrastructure component B, a hotfix patch C, and a compliance constraint D
preconditions: I can only authorize promotion with compliance for a deployment actor A involving an infrastructure component B, a hotfix patch C, and a compliance constraint D if it is the case that pre release checks completed for A and promotion is in progress for A and B is bound to the actor A and C is bound to the actor A and the actor A has the stakeholder group D

I can only authorize promotion with compliance for a deployment actor A involving an infrastructure component B, a hotfix patch C, and a compliance constraint D if it is not the case that promotion is authorized for A
effects: Once I authorize promotion with compliance for a deployment actor A involving an infrastructure component B, a hotfix patch C, and a compliance constraint D, it is the case that promotion is authorized for A and approval is recorded for A

initiate_rollout_phase.description: initiate rollout phase for a deployment actor A with an artifact B and a service C
preconditions: I can only initiate rollout phase for a deployment actor A with an artifact B and a service C if it is the case that promotion is authorized for A and approval is recorded for A and B is bound to the actor A and C is bound to the actor A
effects: Once I initiate rollout phase for a deployment actor A with an artifact B and a service C, it is the case that canary stage is enabled for A

Once I initiate rollout phase for a deployment actor A with an artifact B and a service C, it is not the case anymore that approval is recorded for A and it is not the case anymore that pre release checks completed for A and it is not the case anymore that a rollback is prepared for A

revalidate_target_after_canary.description: revalidate a deployment target B after canary for a deployment actor A using a runbook check C
preconditions: I can only revalidate a deployment target B after canary for a deployment actor A using a runbook check C if it is the case that canary stage is enabled for A and promotion is authorized for A and the actor has an assigned wave for A and B is reserved for the actor in A and C is available
I can only revalidate a deployment target B after canary for a deployment actor A using a runbook check C if it is not the case that pre release checks completed for A
effects: Once I revalidate a deployment target B after canary for a deployment actor A using a runbook check C, it is the case that pre release checks completed for A

commit_targets_for_promotion.description: commit a deployment target B for promotion in a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only commit a deployment target B for promotion in a deployment actor A if it is the case that promotion is authorized for A and pre release checks completed for A and B is reserved for the actor in A
I can only commit a deployment target B for promotion in a deployment actor A if it is not the case that approval is recorded for A and it is not the case that targets are committed for A
effects: Once I commit a deployment target B for promotion in a deployment actor A, it is the case that targets are committed for A

commit_approval_for_promotion.description: commit approval for promotion in a deployment actor A using an approval token B
preconditions: I can only commit approval for promotion in a deployment actor A using an approval token B if it is the case that promotion is authorized for A and pre release checks completed for A and B is available

I can only commit approval for promotion in a deployment actor A using an approval token B if it is not the case that approval is recorded for A and it is not the case that targets are committed for A
effects: Once I commit approval for promotion in a deployment actor A using an approval token B, it is the case that targets are committed for A
Once I commit approval for promotion in a deployment actor A using an approval token B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_component_affiliation.description: assign component a release component B affiliation to a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only assign component a release component B affiliation to a deployment actor A if it is the case that targets are committed for A and B is available and B is permitted for A by the actor
effects: Once I assign component a release component B affiliation to a deployment actor A, it is the case that the component B is assigned to the role A
Once I assign component a release component B affiliation to a deployment actor A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

associate_component_with_agent_or_role.description: associate a release component C with a release train automation agent A or a release train engineer role B
preconditions: I can only associate a release component C with a release train automation agent A or a release train engineer role B if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and the automation agent is available for A and A is assigned to the component C and the component C is assigned to the role B
I can only associate a release component C with a release train automation agent A or a release train engineer role B if it is not the case that C is verified for the actor A
effects: Once I associate a release component C with a release train automation agent A or a release train engineer role B, it is the case that C is verified for the actor A

mark_deployment_ready.description: mark a deployment actor A as deployment ready for a deployment target B with a runbook check C
preconditions: I can only mark a deployment actor A as deployment ready for a deployment target B with a runbook check C if it is the case that the actor is registered for A and the automation agent is available for A and pre release checks completed for A and targets are committed for A and B is reserved for the actor in A and C is available
I can only mark a deployment actor A as deployment ready for a deployment target B with a runbook check C if it is not the case that A is deployment ready
effects: Once I mark a deployment actor A as deployment ready for a deployment target B with a runbook check C, it is the case that A is deployment ready

finalize_actor_registration.description: finalize actor registration for a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only finalize actor registration for a deployment actor A if it is the case that the actor is bootstrapped for A and the actor is registered for A and the actor has an assigned wave for A and promotion is in progress for A and promotion is authorized for A and targets are committed for A and pre release checks completed for A
I can only finalize actor registration for a deployment actor A if it is not the case that the actor is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize actor registration for a deployment actor A, it is the case that the actor is finalized for A

finalize_actor_with_component_validation.description: finalize actor with component validation for a deployment actor A and a release component B
preconditions: I can only finalize actor with component validation for a deployment actor A and a release component B if it is the case that the automation agent is available for A and the actor is registered for A and the actor has an assigned wave for A and promotion is in progress for A and promotion is authorized for A and targets are committed for A and pre release checks completed for A and B is verified for the actor A
I can only finalize actor with component validation for a deployment actor A and a release component B if it is not the case that the actor is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize actor with component validation for a deployment actor A and a release component B, it is the case that the actor is finalized for A

finalize_actor_with_deployment_ready.description: finalize actor with deployment ready for a deployment actor A
preconditions: I can only finalize actor with deployment ready for a deployment actor A if it is the case that the automation agent is available for A and the actor is registered for A and the actor has an assigned wave for A and promotion is in progress for A and promotion is authorized for A and targets are committed for A and pre release checks completed for A and A is deployment ready
I can only finalize actor with deployment ready for a deployment actor A if it is not the case that the actor is finalized for A
effects: Once I finalize actor with deployment ready for a deployment actor A, it is the case that the actor is finalized for A

action_nl_templates.register_release_actor: register release actor for deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.assign_promotion_wave: assign promotion wave {?promotion_wave} to deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.remove_promotion_wave: remove promotion wave {?promotion_wave} from deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.reserve_deployment_target: reserve deployment target {?deployment_target} for deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.release_deployment_target: release deployment target {?deployment_target} from deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.validate_reserved_target: validate deployment target {?deployment_target} reserved for deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.consume_approval_token: consume approval token {?approval_token} for deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.complete_runbook_check: complete runbook check {?runbook_check} for deployment actor {?release_train} on deployment target {?deployment_target}
action_nl_templates.verify_component_for_actor: verify release component {?release_component} for deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.reserve_and_bind_artifact: reserve and bind artifact {?artifact} to deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.release_artifact_binding: release binding of artifact {?artifact} from deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.reserve_and_bind_service: reserve and bind service {?service} to deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.release_service_binding: release binding of service {?service} from deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.reserve_and_bind_infrastructure: reserve and bind infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} to deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.release_infrastructure_binding: release infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} from deployment actor {?release_train} binding
action_nl_templates.reserve_and_bind_patch: reserve and bind hotfix patch {?hotfix_patch} to deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.release_patch_binding: release binding of hotfix patch {?hotfix_patch} from deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.execute_promotion_step: execute promotion step for deployment actor {?release_train} in deployment environment {?deployment_environment} using artifact {?artifact} and service {?service}
action_nl_templates.execute_promotion_with_maintenance: execute promotion with maintenance for deployment actor {?release_train} in deployment environment {?deployment_environment} using infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} during maintenance window {?maintenance_window}
action_nl_templates.clear_rollback_preparation: clear rollback preparation for deployment actor {?release_train} with artifact {?artifact} and service {?service}
action_nl_templates.authorize_promotion_by_stakeholders: authorize promotion by stakeholders for deployment actor {?release_train} with artifact {?artifact}, service {?service}, and canary segment {?canary_segment}
action_nl_templates.authorize_promotion_with_compliance: authorize promotion with compliance for deployment actor {?release_train} involving infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component}, hotfix patch {?hotfix_patch}, and compliance constraint {?compliance_constraint}
action_nl_templates.initiate_rollout_phase: initiate rollout phase for deployment actor {?release_train} with artifact {?artifact} and service {?service}
action_nl_templates.revalidate_target_after_canary: revalidate deployment target {?deployment_target} after canary for deployment actor {?release_train} using runbook check {?runbook_check}
action_nl_templates.commit_targets_for_promotion: commit deployment target {?deployment_target} for promotion in deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.commit_approval_for_promotion: commit approval for promotion in deployment actor {?release_train} using approval token {?approval_token}
action_nl_templates.assign_component_affiliation: assign component release component {?release_component} affiliation to deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.associate_component_with_agent_or_role: associate release component {?release_component} with release train automation agent {?automation_agent} or release train engineer role {?engineer_role}
action_nl_templates.mark_deployment_ready: mark deployment actor {?release_train} as deployment ready for deployment target {?deployment_target} with runbook check {?runbook_check}
action_nl_templates.finalize_actor_registration: finalize actor registration for deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates.finalize_actor_with_component_validation: finalize actor with component validation for deployment actor {?release_train} and release component {?release_component}
action_nl_templates.finalize_actor_with_deployment_ready: finalize actor with deployment ready for deployment actor {?release_train}

predicate_nl_templates.actor_has_assigned_wave: the actor has an assigned wave for {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.wave_permitted_for_actor: the wave {?promotion_wave} is permitted for the actor {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.environment_permitted_for_actor: the environment {?deployment_environment} is permitted for the actor {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.artifact_permitted_for_actor: the artifact {?artifact} is permitted for the actor {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.service_permitted_for_actor: the service {?service} is permitted for the actor {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.infra_permitted_for_actor: the infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} is permitted for the actor {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.maintenance_window_permitted_for_actor: the maintenance window {?maintenance_window} is permitted for the actor {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.patch_permitted_for_actor: the patch {?hotfix_patch} is permitted for the actor {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.actor_has_stakeholder_group: the actor {?release_train} has the stakeholder group {?stakeholder_group}
predicate_nl_templates.component_assigned_to_role: the component {?release_component} is assigned to the role {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.automation_agent_available: the automation agent is available for {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.target_reserved_for_actor: {?deployment_target} is reserved for the actor in {?release_train}
predicate_nl_templates.component_permitted_for_actor: {?release_component} is permitted for {?release_train} by the actor

action_nl_templates_indef.register_release_actor: register release actor for a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_promotion_wave: assign a promotion wave {?promotion_wave} to a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.remove_promotion_wave: remove a promotion wave {?promotion_wave} from a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_deployment_target: reserve a deployment target {?deployment_target} for a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_deployment_target: release a deployment target {?deployment_target} from a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.validate_reserved_target: validate a deployment target {?deployment_target} reserved for a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.consume_approval_token: consume an approval token {?approval_token} for a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_runbook_check: complete a runbook check {?runbook_check} for a deployment actor {?release_train} on a deployment target {?deployment_target}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_component_for_actor: verify a release component {?release_component} for a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_and_bind_artifact: reserve and bind an artifact {?artifact} to a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_artifact_binding: release binding of an artifact {?artifact} from a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_and_bind_service: reserve and bind a service {?service} to a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_service_binding: release binding of a service {?service} from a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_and_bind_infrastructure: reserve and bind an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} to a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_infrastructure_binding: release an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} from a deployment actor {?release_train} binding
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_and_bind_patch: reserve and bind a hotfix patch {?hotfix_patch} to a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_patch_binding: release binding of a hotfix patch {?hotfix_patch} from a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_promotion_step: execute promotion step for a deployment actor {?release_train} in a deployment environment {?deployment_environment} using an artifact {?artifact} and a service {?service}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_promotion_with_maintenance: execute promotion with maintenance for a deployment actor {?release_train} in a deployment environment {?deployment_environment} using an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} during a maintenance window {?maintenance_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_rollback_preparation: clear rollback preparation for a deployment actor {?release_train} with an artifact {?artifact} and a service {?service}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_promotion_by_stakeholders: authorize promotion by stakeholders for a deployment actor {?release_train} with an artifact {?artifact}, a service {?service}, and a canary segment {?canary_segment}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_promotion_with_compliance: authorize promotion with compliance for a deployment actor {?release_train} involving an infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component}, a hotfix patch {?hotfix_patch}, and a compliance constraint {?compliance_constraint}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_rollout_phase: initiate rollout phase for a deployment actor {?release_train} with an artifact {?artifact} and a service {?service}
action_nl_templates_indef.revalidate_target_after_canary: revalidate a deployment target {?deployment_target} after canary for a deployment actor {?release_train} using a runbook check {?runbook_check}
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_targets_for_promotion: commit a deployment target {?deployment_target} for promotion in a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_approval_for_promotion: commit approval for promotion in a deployment actor {?release_train} using an approval token {?approval_token}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_component_affiliation: assign component a release component {?release_component} affiliation to a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.associate_component_with_agent_or_role: associate a release component {?release_component} with a release train automation agent {?automation_agent} or a release train engineer role {?engineer_role}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_deployment_ready: mark a deployment actor {?release_train} as deployment ready for a deployment target {?deployment_target} with a runbook check {?runbook_check}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_actor_registration: finalize actor registration for a deployment actor {?release_train}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_actor_with_component_validation: finalize actor with component validation for a deployment actor {?release_train} and a release component {?release_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_actor_with_deployment_ready: finalize actor with deployment ready for a deployment actor {?release_train}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a deployment actor or a promotion wave or a deployment environment or a service or a artifact or a infrastructure component or a deployment target or a approval token or a release component or a runbook check or a maintenance window or a hotfix patch or a stakeholder group is also a object
Everything that is a canary segment or a compliance constraint is also a stakeholder group
Everything that is a release train engineer role or a release train automation agent is also a deployment actor
